name: memory-heartbeat-reminder-fixes-new
title: 修复并验证三个相关问题：1）长期记忆自动沉淀链路失效，要求任务完成/计划接受等关键事件能稳定触发记忆更新，避免记忆页长期为空；2）心跳机制已有调度与AI编排，但需补齐真正的系统通知触达链路，确保心跳产生的提醒不仅写库，也能被用户收到；3）到时弹窗提醒主链路已存在，但需补齐权限引导与重启后提醒恢复等缺口。
creator: zj669
notes: 2026-03-24 cross-layer check blockers: 1) BootReceiver uses BOOT_COMPLETED intent-filter but manifest currently sets android:exported=false, so reboot restore path is high-risk broken; 2) notification permission flow only opens settings and lacks Android 13+ POST_NOTIFICATIONS runtime request path; 3) RecordTaskEventUseCase triggers memory update via detached CoroutineScope, so DONE/ACCEPTED_PLAN immediate memory sink has reliability/timing risk.
